title: Very Dramatique! 4 Are Rescued After Trainee Driver Plunges Bus Into Seine
summary_full: Nobody was hurt and all were rescued after a bus driver in training hit a parked car and veered into the river near Paris, officials said.
summary_public: Nobody was hurt and all were rescued after a bus driver in training hit a parked car and veered into the river near Paris, officials said.
